title: dumasia villosa subsp. bicolor
intro: Dumasia villosa subsp. bicolor, also known as the Himalayan dumasia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae and is primarily found in the Himalayan region. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Dumasia villosa subsp. bicolor include reducing inflammation, fever, and pain, as well as treating digestive issues and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a decoction, infusion, or topical application to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
